mapper.select: SELECT mall_key, mall_name, sort_order FROM hub_channels ORDER BY sort_order, mall_key
SELECT user_id, mall_key, key, key2, auth_key, mall_id, mall_pw, use_yn, vendor_id FROM user_malls WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY mall_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_malls (user_id, mall_key, key, key2, auth_key, mall_id, mall_pw, use_yn, vendor_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{mallKey}, #{key}, #{key2}, #{authKey}, #{mallId}, #{mallPw}, #{useYn}, #{vendorId})
